data.title: Donald Trump's Crypto Footprint Grows: A Monopoly-Style Game May Be Next
data.description: Donald Trump is expanding his crypto footprint with the development of a digital real estate game that sources say resembles a Monopoly-style experience, marking the latest addition to his fast-growing suite of crypto ventures.

data.title: Bernie Sanders Rallies Against Trump, Musk At Coachella: 'Economy That Is Working Very Well For The Billionaire Class'
data.description: Bernie Sanders made a surprise appearance at Coachella, where he encouraged the young crowd to rally against Donald Trump and Elon Musk.
